examples: It's only sprinkling. We can still go out.
Most were men, but there was also a sprinkling of young women.
A paper just published in the American Chemical Society's journal, Nano suggests a sprinkling of graphene may deal with this problem.
Same story with the apostrophe: in the 18th-century authors were sprinkling apostrophes over everything.
The small sprinkling of blue-and-white faithful that sat behind the Saint Louis bench stood and cheered.
